items.title: Closed test eligibility
checks: At least 12 testers are currently opted in.
Testers remained opted in for 14 consecutive days with no gaps.

items.title: Production access form quality
checks: Tester recruitment method is clearly explained.
Feedback received from testers is summarized with examples.
Fixes made from testing feedback are clearly listed.

items.title: Policy status
checks: No active violations in Play Console Policy status.
No warnings that block publishing.

items.title: App content declarations
checks: Data safety is complete and accurate.
App access declaration is complete if login is required.
Ads declaration is correct.
Content rating is completed.
Target audience is completed.
News declaration is completed if applicable.

items.title: Store listing readiness
checks: Store description matches app behavior.
Screenshots and media are current and accurate.
Privacy Policy URL is reachable and consistent with declarations.

items.title: Permissions and privacy alignment
checks: Only required permissions are requested.
Sensitive permissions are justified in app and in declarations.

items.title: Build quality
checks: Release AAB installs successfully.
No startup, login, or navigation crashes on common devices.
Version code and version name are correct.

items.title: Developer account health
checks: Developer verification and payment profile tasks are complete.
No unresolved account alerts in Play Console.
